## Release-Surface Checklist

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_public_release.py` passes.
- [ ] New or changed claims are reflected in `docs/CLAIMS.md`.
- [ ] New or changed artifacts are reflected in `artifact_manifest.json`.
- [ ] New machine-readable artifacts use strict JSON or a documented format.
- [ ] No raw third-party data, regenerated caches, run logs, secrets, or access tokens were added.
- [ ] Data-source or redistribution-boundary changes are reflected in `docs/DATA_PROVENANCE.md`.
